---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you're trying to solve

<!-- What can't you do today? What's the workflow this would unblock? -->

## The feature you'd like

<!-- Concrete description of the proposed behaviour. CLI surface, config keys, expected output. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other tools, manual workarounds, or different designs you've thought about. -->

## Hardware / platform context

- **Phone vendor + model:** <!-- helpful — features that work on Pixel may not on Samsung -->
- **Bluetooth profile involved:** <!-- HFP, MAP, PBAP, AVRCP, OBEX, GATT, PAN, etc. -->
- **Is this Bluetooth-only, ADB-only, or both?**

## Would you be willing to contribute the implementation?

<!-- All contribution levels welcome — even "I can test on a Pixel 7" helps. -->
